# backend/ml/reference/role_dashboard_catalog.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:17Z

## Purpose
Shared catalog for INSUR role dashboards + reports (§64.37).

Single source of truth used by:
  - backend/routers/insur.py        (serves /dashboards/{dept}/{role})
  - ~/.claude/scripts/scaffold-insur-role-dashboards.py (renders MD)
  - tests/drills/drill_role_dashboards.py (asserts coverage)

Keeps backend + scaffolder in lockstep — change once, both follow.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import hashlib
- from `_` import random
- from `dataclasses` import dataclass
- from `typing` import Any

(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

### Classes

### Functions
- `synthesize_tile_value(dept, role, tile)`: Generate stable synthetic tile data — same dept+role+metric → same value.
- `synthesize_chart_data(dept, role, chart)`: (no docstring)
- `build_dashboard_payload(dept, role)`: (no docstring)
- `build_reports_payload(dept, role)`: (no docstring)
- `_now_iso()`: (no docstring)

- Return values from functions above

- Pick a value range based on the tile's unit
- Status: green / amber / red vs target
- 12 weeks of synthetic data
